name: Pancontinental Oil & Gas NL
summary: Pancontinental Oil & Gas NL explores for oil and gas properties. The company holds interests in the PEL 37 project in Walvis Basin and the PEL 87 project in Orange Basin located in offshore Namibia. It also holds permits in the Cooper Basin, Queensland, Australia. Pancontinental Oil & Gas NL was incorporated in 1985 and is based in West Perth, Australia
